title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the README.md file to include an author section with relevant details.
details: Open the project's README.md file. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a prominent, conventional location). Include the author's full name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to their GitHub profile. Ensure formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file in a markdown viewer to confirm the author section is present, correctly formatted, and contains accurate information. Optionally, request peer review for clarity and professionalism.
